blindsight.name: Blindsight
blindsight.summary: A creature with blindsight perceives its surroundings without relying on sight within a specific radius.

darkvision.name: Darkvision
darkvision.summary: Within its listed range, a creature sees darkness as dim light and sees only shades of gray there.

passive-perception.name: Passive Perception
passive-perception.summary: Passive Wisdom (Perception) is `10 + modifiers`, with `+5` for advantage and `-5` for disadvantage.

tremorsense.name: Tremorsense
tremorsense.summary: A creature with tremorsense detects and pinpoints vibrations within a radius if it and the source touch the same ground or substance.

truesight.name: Truesight
truesight.summary: A creature with truesight can see through normal and magical darkness, see invisibility, detect visual illusions, perceive true forms, and see into the Ethereal Plane within range.
